spec_match.rationale: Demonstrates Window Controls Overlay with app-region: drag for custom titlebar — the core window-drag contract.

interactive.rationale: Shows a custom titlebar with draggable regions and WCO visibility toggle.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Promises a custom titlebar demo; delivers with real draggable regions.

edge_cases.rationale: Doesn't demonstrate the geometrychange event handler or edge-case WCO states.

runtime_evidence.rationale: Browser-tested: titlebar renders, drag regions visible. No console errors.

openQuestions.title: Add geometrychange event demo
openQuestions.detail: The titlebar demo doesn't show handling the geometrychange event when WCO visibility changes.
